_comment: GENERATED from config/plugin-directory.yaml by scripts/plugin_directory.py — do not edit by hand; run `python scripts/plugin_directory.py build`. Curated official-plugin directory served by GET /api/plugins/catalog and rendered in the Plugins ▸ Discover section (ADR 0059). A fork can override it by placing its own plugin-catalog.json in the live config dir. `repo` is the install URL (one-click install runs `plugin install <repo>`, ADR 0058 — works on every surface incl. the frozen desktop app).

plugins.name: Discord
plugins.tagline: Run your agent as a Discord bot — inbound DMs + @-mentions, outbound send/read/react tools.

plugins.name: Artifact (Generative UI)
plugins.tagline: Render HTML/SVG/Mermaid/React into a sandboxed iframe (show_artifact). Ships built-in with protoAgent.

plugins.name: Terminal
plugins.tagline: A full terminal (xterm.js + a real PTY over WebSocket) as a console view, themed from the design system.

plugins.name: Agent Browser
plugins.tagline: Browser automation backed by vercel-labs/agent-browser: tools + skill + workflows + a live browser panel.

plugins.name: Project Board
plugins.tagline: Board-driven coding orchestration — a beads board + ACP spawn loop + planning layer + console view.

plugins.name: Portfolio
plugins.tagline: Multi-team orchestration — one PM across many project boards over A2A (ADR 0055).

plugins.name: Product Manager
plugins.tagline: PM toolkit — 65 PM skills, a provenance-enforced PM Brain, specialist subagents, and a brain dashboard.

plugins.name: SpaceTraders
plugins.tagline: An autonomous SpaceTraders fleet commander — crew subagents, navigation/mining/trading tools, workflows, and a Fleet dashboard. The reference full-bundle plugin.

plugins.name: protoTrader Finance
plugins.tagline: Trading research as a full bundle — market data, backtesting, factor IC, a behavioral journal, a gated paper broker, the research desk, and a Quant Desk dashboard.

plugins.name: Monarch Money
plugins.tagline: Give your agent access to Monarch Money via its MCP server.

plugins.name: DOOM
plugins.tagline: But can it run DOOM? Play shareware DOOM in a console view via WebAssembly (prboom).

plugins.name: Career Coach
plugins.tagline: Your career coach & job-hunt copilot — strategy, mock interviews, honest CV feedback, and offer/negotiation coaching, plus an autonomous evaluate→tailor→apply pipeline. A full-surface plugin showcase.

plugins.name: GitHub (read/write tools)
plugins.tagline: Read AND write GitHub over the gh CLI — PRs, issues, diffs, CI, repo files; plus gated create/edit/merge/close, comments, labels (per-agent write gating). Ships a read-only Issues/PRs board, a util-bar New-issue widget, and the user-only /issue command.

plugins.name: Google Workspace
plugins.tagline: Google Workspace for your agent, built to grow — Gmail (read + draft-only, never sends, plus mailbox hygiene) and Calendar (read + free/busy + search).

plugins.name: Cowork (document skills)
plugins.tagline: Office-document skills for the Cowork archetype — Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and PDF as real files — plus schedule, memory-consolidation, and writing-voice habits (ADR 0083).

plugins.name: Claude Bridge
plugins.tagline: Explore Claude Code's on-disk state — sessions, memory, scratchpads — and translate its skills, subagents, and MCP config over to protoAgent.

plugins.name: Computer Use
plugins.tagline: Drive native GUI apps on this machine — snapshot a window's accessibility tree, then click/type/scroll by element without stealing focus. Wraps the cua-driver binary.

plugins.name: Learning Wiki
plugins.tagline: An adaptive learning wiki — an LLM-maintained, interlinked concept wiki plus a learner ledger: per-concept strength, misconceptions, and FSRS-scheduled review.

plugins.name: protoBanana (image gen)
plugins.tagline: Native image generation and editing via the protoBanana gateway — text-to-image, instruction edits, and identity-preserving edits over self-hosted ComfyUI workflows.

plugins.name: PR Reviewer (protoPatch)
plugins.tagline: The deterministic half of the PR-review QA tier — budgeted protoPatch structural reviews as a fifth review-panel member (ADR 0078).
